description: Weak pattern detection rules for resume bullet point analysis. Each pattern includes a regex-compatible expression for matching, the weakness category, and a recommended fix approach. Used by the content-analyst agent to flag problematic bullet constructions.
usage: Apply patterns against each bullet point. When a match is found, flag the bullet with the corresponding category, explain the issue, and suggest a rewrite using the fix_guidance.

responsibility_prefixes.description: Phrases that signal a duty description rather than an accomplishment. These turn achievements into passive job descriptions.

patterns.example_match: Responsible for managing a team of 5 engineers
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with a strong action verb. Example: 'Led a team of 5 engineers to deliver...'

patterns.example_match: In charge of the company's cloud infrastructure
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with an ownership verb. Example: 'Managed the company's cloud infrastructure, achieving 99.9% uptime'

patterns.example_match: Tasked with improving test coverage
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with the action taken. Example: 'Increased test coverage from 45% to 92% by implementing...'

patterns.example_match: Duties included maintaining production servers
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe what was accomplished instead. Example: 'Maintained 30+ production servers with 99.95% uptime'

patterns.example_match: Accountable for quarterly financial reporting
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with an action and result. Example: 'Delivered quarterly financial reports to C-suite, reducing close time by 3 days'

patterns.example_match: Charged with overseeing vendor relationships
patterns.fix_guidance: State what was done and the impact. Example: 'Negotiated vendor contracts saving $150K annually'

weak_action_verbs.description: Verbs that dilute the candidate's impact by obscuring their actual role and contribution level.

patterns.example_match: Helped design the new authentication system
patterns.fix_guidance: Use the specific action. 'Helped design' becomes 'Co-designed' or 'Designed' if the candidate was the primary contributor

patterns.example_match: Assisted with customer onboarding process improvements
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with the specific contribution. Example: 'Redesigned customer onboarding flow, reducing time-to-value by 40%'

patterns.example_match: Worked on the company's main product
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with the specific action. 'Worked on the product' becomes 'Built the payments module for the product' or 'Optimized product performance'

patterns.example_match: Participated in agile ceremonies and sprint planning
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe the specific role and impact. Example: 'Facilitated sprint planning for a 10-person team, improving story point accuracy by 25%'

patterns.example_match: Was involved in migrating the database to PostgreSQL
patterns.fix_guidance: State the direct action. Example: 'Migrated 5 MySQL databases to PostgreSQL, reducing query latency by 30%'

patterns.example_match: Contributed to the open-source framework
patterns.fix_guidance: Specify the contribution. Example: 'Authored 15 pull requests to the framework, adding OAuth2 support and fixing 8 critical bugs'

patterns.description: Starts with 'Supported' (when used as a weak action verb)
patterns.example_match: Supported the QA team in testing activities
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe the actual support action. Example: 'Built automated test suites for the QA team, reducing manual testing effort by 60%'

patterns.example_match: Handled customer complaints and escalations
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe the process and outcome. Example: 'Resolved 50+ customer escalations per month, maintaining a 95% satisfaction rating'

passive_voice.description: Passive constructions that remove the candidate as the agent of the action, weakening the impact of the statement.

patterns.example_match: Was selected to lead the new initiative
patterns.fix_guidance: Restructure to active voice. Example: 'Selected to lead a $2M initiative' or better: 'Led a $2M initiative that...'

patterns.example_match: Has been recognized for excellent performance
patterns.fix_guidance: Use active past tense. Example: 'Earned 3 consecutive performance awards for exceeding targets by 20%+'

patterns.example_match: Was asked to take over the failing project
patterns.fix_guidance: Lead with the action. Example: 'Rescued a failing project, delivering it on-time and under budget'

patterns.example_match: Was given responsibility for the East Coast region
patterns.fix_guidance: State ownership directly. Example: 'Managed the East Coast region, growing revenue 25% year-over-year'

patterns.example_match: Was promoted to Senior Engineer after 18 months
patterns.fix_guidance: Reframe as an achievement. Example: 'Earned promotion to Senior Engineer within 18 months based on technical leadership'

patterns.example_match: Was assigned to the critical security remediation project
patterns.fix_guidance: Lead with the action. Example: 'Drove security remediation across 12 services, closing all critical vulnerabilities within 30 days'

vague_scope.description: Words that indicate undefined scale where specific numbers would be more impactful. These suggest the candidate cannot or did not quantify their work.

patterns.example_match: Managed various projects across multiple teams
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with specific numbers or ranges. Example: 'Managed 8 concurrent projects across 4 teams'

patterns.example_match: Achieved significant improvement in system performance
patterns.fix_guidance: Quantify the improvement. Example: 'Improved system response time by 65%, from 800ms to 280ms'

patterns.description: Vague size descriptors for quantifiable entities
patterns.example_match: Led a large team on a major project
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with specifics. Example: 'Led a 15-person team on a $3M platform migration'

patterns.example_match: Regularly met with stakeholders to discuss progress
patterns.fix_guidance: State specific cadence and purpose. Example: 'Conducted weekly stakeholder reviews with VP-level executives, aligning 3 workstreams'

patterns.description: Uses 'etc.' to trail off instead of being specific
patterns.example_match: Managed servers, databases, networking, etc.
patterns.fix_guidance: Either list the specific items or summarize the scope. Example: 'Managed the full infrastructure stack: 20 servers, 5 database clusters, and 3 network zones'

filler_phrases.description: Empty phrases that add words but no meaning. Removing them makes bullets more concise and impactful.

patterns.description: Contains 'in order to' (can be replaced with 'to')
patterns.example_match: Redesigned the API in order to improve performance
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace 'in order to' with 'to'. Example: 'Redesigned the API to improve performance by 40%'

patterns.description: Contains 'on a daily basis' (can be replaced with 'daily')
patterns.example_match: Reviewed code on a daily basis
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with 'daily' or better yet, quantify. Example: 'Reviewed 10+ pull requests daily, maintaining team velocity'

patterns.description: Contains 'successfully' (redundant if the result proves success)
patterns.example_match: Successfully launched the new product feature
patterns.fix_guidance: Remove 'successfully' and let the result demonstrate success. Example: 'Launched product feature adopted by 10K users in the first month'

patterns.example_match: Effectively managed the project timeline
patterns.fix_guidance: Remove 'effectively' and add evidence. Example: 'Managed project timeline, delivering 2 weeks ahead of schedule'

patterns.example_match: Resolved customer issues in a timely manner
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with specific turnaround time. Example: 'Resolved customer issues within 4-hour SLA, achieving 98% on-time resolution'

patterns.example_match: Utilized Python and SQL to build reports
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with 'used' or remove entirely if the tools are obvious from context. Better: lead with the action verb. Example: 'Built automated reporting pipeline using Python and SQL'

patterns.example_match: Leveraged cloud technologies to improve scalability
patterns.fix_guidance: Replace with the specific action. Example: 'Migrated to AWS Lambda, reducing infrastructure costs by 30% while handling 3x more traffic'

patterns.description: Contains 'as needed' (implies ad-hoc rather than proactive work)
patterns.example_match: Provided support to other teams as needed
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe the specific support and its impact. Example: 'Provided on-call technical support for 3 partner teams, resolving 95% of escalations same-day'

job_description_language.description: Language that reads like it was copied from a job posting rather than describing personal accomplishments.

patterns.example_match: Ensure compliance with SOX regulations
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe a specific compliance achievement. Example: 'Achieved zero audit findings across 3 consecutive SOX audits by implementing automated controls'

patterns.example_match: Maintain documentation for all team processes
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe what was maintained and the impact. Example: 'Authored and maintained 40-page engineering playbook, reducing new hire ramp-up time from 6 weeks to 3'

patterns.example_match: Provide technical guidance to junior developers
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe the mentorship and its outcome. Example: 'Mentored 5 junior developers through technical design reviews, with 3 earning promotions within a year'

patterns.example_match: Perform duties as assigned by management
patterns.fix_guidance: Remove entirely or replace with a specific accomplishment. This adds no value to the resume.

patterns.example_match: Manage day-to-day operations of the department
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe the scale and a specific outcome. Example: 'Managed operations for a 25-person department, reducing operational costs by 15% year-over-year'

patterns.description: Starts with 'Serve as' (defines role rather than accomplishment)
patterns.example_match: Serve as the primary point of contact for client issues
patterns.fix_guidance: Describe the impact of serving in that capacity. Example: 'Managed relationships with 12 enterprise clients ($5M+ ARR), achieving 100% retention'
